function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_crc_kat.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_crc_kat
description: >
  Verifies the CRC accelerator of mspm33c321a_derivative using known-answer
  tests (KATs) for CRC-32 (IEEE 802.3), CRC-16 (CCITT), and CRC-8 (MAXIM)
  polynomials, plus a register smoke test covering polynomial selection,
  data input, and result registers.
checklist_ids:
  - CRC-01
  - CRC-02
  - CRC-03
  - CRC-04
test_names:
  - test_crc32_kat
  - test_crc16_kat
  - test_crc8_kat
  - test_crc_reg_smoke
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices: []

crc_test_vectors:
  - name: crc32_ieee8023
    polynomial: 0x04C11DB7
    init_value: 0xFFFFFFFF
    input_reflected: true
    output_reflected: true
    final_xor: 0xFFFFFFFF
    input_bytes: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]  # "123456789"
    expected_result: 0xCBF43926
  - name: crc16_ccitt
    polynomial: 0x1021
    init_value: 0xFFFF
    input_reflected: false
    output_reflected: false
    final_xor: 0x0000
    input_bytes: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    expected_result: 0x29B1
  - name: crc8_maxim
    polynomial: 0x31
    init_value: 0x00
    input_reflected: true
    output_reflected: true
    final_xor: 0x00
    input_bytes: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    expected_result: 0xA1

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; CRC accelerator initialised
  - step: 2
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: POLY_SEL
    value: CRC32_IEEE8023
    description: Select CRC-32 IEEE 802.3 polynomial
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: INIT
    value: 0xFFFFFFFF
    description: Load CRC-32 init value
  - step: 4
    action: apb_burst_write_crc
    peripheral: CRC0
    data: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    description: Feed "123456789" into CRC data register byte by byte
  - step: 5
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: RESULT
    expected: 0xCBF43926
    description: Read CRC-32 result; compare against known answer
  - step: 6
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: POLY_SEL
    value: CRC16_CCITT
    description: Switch to CRC-16 CCITT polynomial
  - step: 7
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: INIT
    value: 0xFFFF
    description: Load CRC-16 init value
  - step: 8
    action: apb_burst_write_crc
    peripheral: CRC0
    data: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    description: Feed "123456789" into CRC data register
  - step: 9
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: RESULT
    expected: 0x29B1
    description: Read CRC-16 result; compare against known answer
  - step: 10
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: POLY_SEL
    value: CRC8_MAXIM
    description: Switch to CRC-8 MAXIM polynomial
  - step: 11
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: INIT
    value: 0x00
    description: Load CRC-8 init value
  - step: 12
    action: apb_burst_write_crc
    peripheral: CRC0
    data: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    description: Feed "123456789" into CRC data register
  - step: 13
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: RESULT
    expected: 0xA1
    description: Read CRC-8 result; compare against known answer
  - step: 14
    action: apb_read_all_csr
    peripherals: [CRC0]
    description: Read all CRC CSRs; verify accessibility and reset defaults

checks:
  - id: CHK-CRC-01
    checklist_id: CRC-01
    description: CRC-32 result for "123456789" equals 0xCBF43926
    expected: RESULT == 0xCBF43926
  - id: CHK-CRC-02
    checklist_id: CRC-02
    description: CRC-16 result for "123456789" equals 0x29B1
    expected: RESULT == 0x29B1
  - id: CHK-CRC-03
    checklist_id: CRC-03
    description: CRC-8 result for "123456789" equals 0xA1
    expected: RESULT == 0xA1
  - id: CHK-CRC-04
    checklist_id: CRC-04
    description: CRC polynomial selection, data, and result registers all accessible
    expected: No APB errors; registers readable and writable

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-CRC checks PASS
  - All three KAT results match reference values exactly
  - No APB errors during CSR access
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

args.file_text:
scenario_name: scenario_crc_kat
description: >
  Verifies the CRC accelerator of mspm33c321a_derivative using known-answer
  tests (KATs) for CRC-32 (IEEE 802.3), CRC-16 (CCITT), and CRC-8 (MAXIM)
  polynomials, plus a register smoke test covering polynomial selection,
  data input, and result registers.
checklist_ids:
  - CRC-01
  - CRC-02
  - CRC-03
  - CRC-04
test_names:
  - test_crc32_kat
  - test_crc16_kat
  - test_crc8_kat
  - test_crc_reg_smoke
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices: []

crc_test_vectors:
  - name: crc32_ieee8023
    polynomial: 0x04C11DB7
    init_value: 0xFFFFFFFF
    input_reflected: true
    output_reflected: true
    final_xor: 0xFFFFFFFF
    input_bytes: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]  # "123456789"
    expected_result: 0xCBF43926
  - name: crc16_ccitt
    polynomial: 0x1021
    init_value: 0xFFFF
    input_reflected: false
    output_reflected: false
    final_xor: 0x0000
    input_bytes: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    expected_result: 0x29B1
  - name: crc8_maxim
    polynomial: 0x31
    init_value: 0x00
    input_reflected: true
    output_reflected: true
    final_xor: 0x00
    input_bytes: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    expected_result: 0xA1

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; CRC accelerator initialised
  - step: 2
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: POLY_SEL
    value: CRC32_IEEE8023
    description: Select CRC-32 IEEE 802.3 polynomial
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: INIT
    value: 0xFFFFFFFF
    description: Load CRC-32 init value
  - step: 4
    action: apb_burst_write_crc
    peripheral: CRC0
    data: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    description: Feed "123456789" into CRC data register byte by byte
  - step: 5
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: RESULT
    expected: 0xCBF43926
    description: Read CRC-32 result; compare against known answer
  - step: 6
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: POLY_SEL
    value: CRC16_CCITT
    description: Switch to CRC-16 CCITT polynomial
  - step: 7
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: INIT
    value: 0xFFFF
    description: Load CRC-16 init value
  - step: 8
    action: apb_burst_write_crc
    peripheral: CRC0
    data: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    description: Feed "123456789" into CRC data register
  - step: 9
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: RESULT
    expected: 0x29B1
    description: Read CRC-16 result; compare against known answer
  - step: 10
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: POLY_SEL
    value: CRC8_MAXIM
    description: Switch to CRC-8 MAXIM polynomial
  - step: 11
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: INIT
    value: 0x00
    description: Load CRC-8 init value
  - step: 12
    action: apb_burst_write_crc
    peripheral: CRC0
    data: [0x31, 0x32, 0x33, 0x34, 0x35, 0x36, 0x37, 0x38, 0x39]
    description: Feed "123456789" into CRC data register
  - step: 13
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: CRC0
    register: RESULT
    expected: 0xA1
    description: Read CRC-8 result; compare against known answer
  - step: 14
    action: apb_read_all_csr
    peripherals: [CRC0]
    description: Read all CRC CSRs; verify accessibility and reset defaults

checks:
  - id: CHK-CRC-01
    checklist_id: CRC-01
    description: CRC-32 result for "123456789" equals 0xCBF43926
    expected: RESULT == 0xCBF43926
  - id: CHK-CRC-02
    checklist_id: CRC-02
    description: CRC-16 result for "123456789" equals 0x29B1
    expected: RESULT == 0x29B1
  - id: CHK-CRC-03
    checklist_id: CRC-03
    description: CRC-8 result for "123456789" equals 0xA1
    expected: RESULT == 0xA1
  - id: CHK-CRC-04
    checklist_id: CRC-04
    description: CRC polynomial selection, data, and result registers all accessible
    expected: No APB errors; registers readable and writable

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-CRC checks PASS
  - All three KAT results match reference values exactly
  - No APB errors during CSR access
